tool_args.label: Dutchess County 2024 Actual Gross MRT Receipts
Orange County 2024 Actual Gross MRT Receipts
Rockland County 2024 Actual Gross MRT Receipts
Statutory Minimum Mass Transportation Operating Assistance
tool_args.raw_text: Under the statute, Dutchess and Orange Counties are each to receive no less than $1.5 million annually, and Rockland County is to receive no less than $2.0 million annually.

payload.claim_text: Dutchess and Orange Counties are each to receive no less than $1.5 million annually, and Rockland County is to receive no less than $2.0 million annually in mass transportation operating assistance from MTA's MRT-2 receipts.
payload.description: Statutory minimum mass transportation operating assistance payments to Dutchess, Orange and Rockland counties

tool_args.label: MRT-1 Escalator Calculation Method
tool_args.raw_text: Pursuant to PAL §1270-a (4)(c), the MRT-1 increase is to be calculated as if the MRT-1 tax was 25 cents per $100 of mortgage recorded and not the current 30 cents per $100 of mortgage recorded.

payload.claim_text: The MRT-1 increase is to be calculated as if the MRT-1 tax was 25 cents per $100 of mortgage recorded and not the current 30 cents per $100 of mortgage recorded, pursuant to PAL §1270-a (4)(c).
payload.description: Statutory method for calculating MRT-1 increase for escalator payments

tool_args.label: Escalator Payment Formula
tool_args.raw_text: (FY2023 MRT Receipts - FY1989 Base Year MRT Receipts) / FY1989 Base Year MRT Receipts = Escalator Rate. Escalator Rate × Minimum Mass Transit Operating Assistance Payment = Escalator Payment.

payload.claim_text: Escalator Rate = (FY2023 MRT Receipts - FY1989 Base Year MRT Receipts) / FY1989 Base Year MRT Receipts. Escalator Payment = Escalator Rate × Minimum Mass Transit Operating Assistance Payment.
payload.description: Formula for calculating escalator payments to Dutchess, Orange and Rockland counties
